audit_items.proof_trace: `_getAssetPrice(asset, false)` in `checkUpkeep` never reverts on invalid prices because the revert block in `PriceManager._getAssetPrice` is guarded by `if (withValidation)` (lines 409–416), which is skipped when `withValidation=false`. The returned `isPriceValid` flag is correctly used throughout `checkUpkeep` to gate new auction eligibility (line 255), guard dust-based end detection (line 251), and block eligible-assets output when the assetOut price is invalid (lines 271–273).
